## Purpose

Describe the player-facing or technical outcome.

## Scope

- Systems changed:
- Files or assets added/modified:
- Explicitly out of scope:

## Persistence and migration

- Save/profile schema impact:
- Migration or repair behavior:
- Rollback behavior:

## Validation

- [ ] Repository hygiene check passed.
- [ ] Unity version recorded.
- [ ] Unity compilation completed without errors.
- [ ] Relevant Editor validator passed.
- [ ] Relevant Play Mode checklist completed.
- [ ] No Unity success is claimed without target-editor evidence.

## Evidence and limitations

Include logs, screenshots, captures, and known limitations.
